headline: 🏅Conversations 🏅 Pronunciation
bio:
🌈 National Taiwan University 106-hour Teaching Chinese as a Second Language Certificate
🌈10+ years of teaching experience with diverse students - adults, children, beginners, and advanced learners.
🌈Native Chinese speaker living in Poland, familiar with East-West cultural and language differences.
🌈Practical, personalized lessons: pronunciation, tones, and daily conversations to build confidence in speaking.
🌈Patient and structured teaching style in a relaxed learning environment.
🌈Now offering one-on-one courses tailored to your goals- speaking, pronunciation, or long-term learning.

🌈Lessons start with basic pronunciation and tones to build a solid foundation and prevent early mistakes.
🌈Focus on practical daily situations, like self-introductions, shopping, ordering food, work, and social conversations.
🌈Personalized content based on student level and goals, for beginners and intermediate learners alike.
🌈Role-playing real-life scenarios to use common phrases and idioms confidently, reducing speaking anxiety.

💥Relaxed and structured teaching style-no pressure, but clear guidance for learning.
💥Focus on understanding and practical use, helping students actually apply what they learn, not just memorize.
💥Believe language is for communication, making the learning 
process efficient and effective.

🔆Course Guidelines:
    *Please be on time.
    *Notify in advance if you need to cancel or reschedule to help with planning.
    *Actively participate, speak up, and ask questions ,don’t be afraid of making mistakes.

headline: Have No Fear, I Am Here! 🙋
bio:
What I offer to my students:
 
✅Received Certificate from American Academy for English. 🎓
 
✅ Native Chinese speakers; can help you if you are too nervous to speak English.
 
✅ If you are unable to express yourself in English. I can help you improve your vocabulary so you can speak with ease.
 
✅ Conversation techniques, I can help you talk to foreigners with confidence 👱‍♀️🧔
 
✅ American culture and food. 🍔 🍟 🥓 🥩 🥨 
 
✅ Travel English.  ✈️ 🗺 🗽 🏝 🗿 📸

🙋Hello! My name is Jessica, I am 30 years old and I am from Taiwan. I can remember ever since I was a child that I always wanted to learn English. When I finally started to learn, I was able to read and write, but my speaking and listening skills were not good.
 
🌻 Last year, I went to study English at an English Learning Academy in America. During this time, I learned how to speak confidently and my listening skills increased greatly.

🌵I share this experience with you because I understand how scary speaking English can be.
 
🌞 My goal for all of my students is to make each of you feel comfortable enough to speak English. Whether you want to travel to an English speaking country or just talk to foreigners who live in your country, I can help you with all of those things.
 
🌎 I can teach you about the American lifestyle. I can help you to understand how to think like an American and how to make friends quickly. I can give lessons on food and culture. I can also help you with your conversation skills. I will help you to feel comfortable and relaxed when you are speaking English. If you want to travel to America, I can help you with travel English.
 
👼 As you can see, I have the experience to teach English to people from all different backgrounds! I can help take your English to the next level! 

Thanks, and I hope to see you soon! 😉

bio:
❤️ CURRENT/PAST STUDENTS - get in touch for discounts & offers

❤️  STUDY FOR IELTS, exams in your country or citizenship test in UK/USA/Canada (even if your command of English is limited)

📣What can you expect from each of my classes:
➡️ TO CORRECT your grammar, pronunciation, spelling etc using methods customised to you
➡️ TO ACQUIRE a British/neutral pronunciation and intonation with proven fast results
➡️ ADOPT a British spelling, besides classes packed with interactive materials adapted to your specific needs
➡️ WRITTEN REPORT after each class containing materials used, plus video of each class to practice again; besides proposals on how to improve fast and extra homework if you want to test your knowledge
➡️ MOST IMPORTANTLY: a stress free, relaxed yet meticulous teaching approach, great if you are shy or nervous yet willing to learn


 📣I am positive, relaxed and pro-active, putting you at ease from the first minutes of the Trial Class:
🌍  EXPERIENCE - 25 years plus tutoring experience with students of all levels, all ages in the UK/Europe/Middle East/North America, online/face to face in small and large classes
🌍  LANGUAGES - I speak fluently many languages, having lived in several Middle Eastern and European countries; I currently live between the UK and USA/Canada
🌍 TRAVEL - according to my reviews on well known travel websites I visited half of the planet
🌍 EDUCATION - I have several decades of education: I first studied Science (it was either Science or the Medical field), Economics and Politics, IT with focus on design software, besides languages, art etc
🌍 WORK - I started working as a teacher as soon as I finished the University; I have also worked in the financial sector in London, as well as in IT, publishing and the property field etc 
🌍 CHARITY - I do lots of charity work since I was very young and I still help some global charities on a daily basis
🌍 LIFE STYLE - I live by the Confucian motto 'treat everyone the way you would like to be treated' hence treating everything and everyone with the utmost respect and care


📣I will concentrate on advice and benefits for you:
- TO SPEAK English with a proper accent, easily understood all over the world
- TO PREPARE you for exams/job interviews using the best materials available: nothing can match an Individual class tailored to YOUR needs where you get my undivided attention 
- INTERVIEW DRILLS, as used in the UK, USA, Canada
- REPETITIVE sentences to achieve the best pronunciation, study grammar, idioms etc 
- TO IMPROVE your CV, cover letter and recommendations to achieve excellent results for school/job interviews
- LASTLY BUT NOT LEAST, I tend to be in the class 10 min in advance to ensure you will improve your English starting with the Trial Class: we will work on making little steps with every single class and analyse the results at the end of it


📣 For mature students and not only:
- FREE TALK to speak spontaneously on any subject of interest
- ANALYSE grammar, discuss idioms, improve your vocabulary or pronunciation/intonation etc via all type of exercises
- PRACTICE via dialogues ranging from business dialogues or every day dialogues in a range of situations; or reading articles from the medical field, legal subjects, science, travel, work, life, politics, cinematography etc due to my interests in all these fields
-  PRACTICE IELTS tests + mock exams
-  DISCUSS terminologies plus their meaning in your field of interest, whether medical, pharmacy/chemistry, legal, travel, art, software, manufacturing, trade etc


📣For medical, legal, business, science etc students:
-  PREPARE you for interviews and improve your CV, cover letter, recommendations etc
-  PRACTICE phone conversations and how to tackle different subjects
-  CONCENTRATE on medical/legal/business etc expressions, conversations and their meaning in UK/USA/Canada or Europe
-  HELP you understand medical/legal/business etc life in UK/USA/Canada and what is expected of you, besides life after work


📣 Children: 7 to 14 years old:
- LEARN via classes customised to your needs: flash cards, picture books, reading fun stories/dialogues to reading articles etc
- ADAPT every class to meet YOUR needs and ensure a fast progress whether analysing grammar, idioms etc while doing hundreds of exercises - NO NEED to buy books!!!
- ANALYSE and summarise a story 
- STUDY at your own pace
- BUILD confidence when speaking
- RECEIVE detailed feedback, advice
- MOST IMPORTANTLY: you will learn new things starting with the first minutes of your Trial class


📣 What to expect in this 25-min trial class❓
❤️ ANALYSIS of your current level - identify what needs working on
❤️ IMPROVE your English starting with the Trial Class 
❤️TEST your reading, grammar, spelling etc for fast improvement
❤️ RECEIVE report feedback, class video, advice, tests etc 


📣Classroom Rules ❕
↘️ BRING your pen and a notebook to write down useful information   
↘️ ALWAYS check your connection and device before class starts
↘️ CANCEL a class you cannot attend several days in advance and give the chance to another student to book that class.  Please check DAILY my available learning slots to find a new, convenient class.

name: Lulu
headline: 🎉Fun English Chat🎈News English
bio:
I’m Lulu 👋I graduated from National Taiwan Normal University with a degree in Chinese-English Translation.

I was ranked in the top 1% nationwide on Taiwan’s university entrance exams, scored full marks in English, and later became a teaching assistant at the Harvard Taiwan Leadership Camp, where I even hosted an all-English ballroom event!
Speaking, presenting, and helping students enjoy English—that’s my passion.


My classes are super flexible—1-on-1 or small groups, and every lesson is tailored to your needs and level.

🎯 For absolute beginners: We’ll start with daily conversation, natural sentence patterns, and useful phrases to help you speak right away.
🎯 For junior and senior high school students: I offer precise training in writing, speaking, grammar, and test-taking strategies to boost scores and real ability.
🎯 For college students and professionals: We’ll work on presentation skills, interview English, business emails, and test prep like TOEIC and GEPT.
🎯 I also offer News English classes using real articles from CNN, BBC, and more—perfect for advanced learners looking to improve vocabulary, fluency, and critical thinking.


Teaching Strengths

I’m great at making complicated grammar or concepts easy to understand—because I know exactly what it’s like to learn English from scratch.

Instead of just memorizing rules, I focus on real expression, logic, and language flow.
In fact, I won the Gold Award for first place in a public speaking course at National Taiwan University, thanks to my ability to explain clearly and keep things interesting!

🌟 One of my proudest achievements is winning First Prize (Top Honor) in Taiwan’s 2023 National Distance English Teaching Program, hosted by the Ministry of Education.

Many of my students started off shy, afraid to speak, or unsure of grammar.
But after learning with me, they were able to give confident self-introductions, join competitions, and write clear, organized English essays. That’s the kind of progress I live for!



🐶 Come join My Trial Class! 🐶
What to expect in this 25-min trial❓

➡️ Plot your learning journey with me!
➡️ A detailed analysis of your current level 
➡️ A problem-solving mini-lesson 
➡️ Valuable learning methods to stop wasting time!

❗️Classroom Rules ❕
↘️ Bring your pen and a notebook to collect useful expressions in class.
↘️ Always check your connection and devices before class starts.
↘️ Cancel the class 24 hours before class. If you have to cancel a class within 24 hours, be sure you notify me through What’s App/AT Chat

name: Verna Your Last Grammar
headline: Grammar | Prep Class | Writing
bio:
🔹 Uses custom-made materials and a step-by-step system, building a solid foundation from basic to advanced levels.
🔹 Focuses on essential grammar for exams to boost problem-solving and writing skills.
🔹 Practical approach that helps you truly understand grammar, not just memorize rules.
🔹 Designed for learners who’ve struggled before or are relearning grammar.
🔹 Guides you from sentence patterns and language sense to exam techniques, strengthening your overall English ability.
🔹 Learn it once, use it for life—no more fear of grammar in exams or writing!

✨ What will you gain from my course?

🔹 Master 15+ key grammar topics (tenses, sentence structures, relative clauses, passive voice, conjunctions, etc.)
🔹 Get familiar with essential grammar patterns for exams.
🔹 Write clear, correct sentences and paragraphs—especially for essays and translation tasks.
🔹 Turn partial understanding into real comprehension and accuracy.
🔹 Learn 1 practical grammar tip in just 25 minutes and feel immediate progress.
🔹 Build complete notes and a clear grammar system that makes review easy.

💡 Class Policy
🔹 Before booking, please message Teacher Verna to share your learning background, level, and goals so I can prepare the best-fit lesson for you!
🔹 You may cancel lessons on your own at least 12 hours in advance (and please also notify me via Line 🔍 @636phaly).
🔹 Cancellations within 12 hours are non-refundable. Please make up the lesson within 7 days (time can be arranged with the teacher).
🔹 Try to book at least one lesson per week to stay in touch with English and keep your language sense sharp 🤍
